SDK / API / 对外扩展点

状态已完成
难度中等
预计阅读40 分钟
源文件markdown/12-sdk-api-extension.md

Agent 生成档案

Section titled “Agent 生成档案”
  • 章节 ID：12-sdk-api-extension
  • 章节摘要：理解 HTTP API、generated SDK、plugin hooks 和扩展点如何让外部程序接入 OpenCode。
  • 章节元数据：/data/chapters.json
  • 源码映射：/data/source-map.json

主要源码路径

Section titled “主要源码路径”
  • packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts
  • packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
  • packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts
  • packages/plugin/src/index.ts

对应模块：study-output/02-opencode-function-outline.md 的 “2.12 SDK / API / 对外扩展点”。
主要源码：packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts、packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts、packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts、packages/plugin/src/index.ts、packages/plugin/src/tool.ts。

0. 本章学习目标

Section titled “0. 本章学习目标”

这一章要理解 OpenCode 如何把内部 agent runtime 暴露给外部世界。

学完你应该能说清：

  • HTTP API 如何按 group 组合成 Root/Instance/Event/Pty/OpenCode API。
  • server routes 如何把 API handlers 和 runtime services 装配到 Effect layer。
  • SDK client 如何包装 generated client，并注入 directory header。
  • SDK server helper 如何启动 opencode serve 或 TUI。
  • Event API 如何用 SSE 输出 Bus events。
  • Plugin 系统如何加载内部/外部插件，提供 SDK client、project/worktree/serverUrl，并触发 hooks。
  • Tool 插件 API 如何让外部插件提供新工具。

1. 一句话讲明白

Section titled “1. 一句话讲明白”

SDK / API / 扩展层是 OpenCode 的“外部接口层”：server 用 Effect HTTP API 把 session、file、provider、permission、event 等能力组合成 typed API；JS SDK 包装 generated client 给 CLI/UI/插件使用；插件系统把 SDK、项目上下文和 hook trigger 暴露给外部模块，让外部代码能参与 provider、tool、shell.env、chat.params、event 等扩展点。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240、packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274。

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62 
30export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")31  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)32  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)33  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)34  .middleware(Authorization)3536export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")37  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)38  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)39  .addHttpApi(FileApi)40  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)41  .addHttpApi(McpApi)42  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)43  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)44  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)45  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)46  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)47  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)48  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)49  .addHttpApi(V2Api)50  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)51  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)52  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)5354export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])6061export type RootHttpApiType = typeof RootHttpApi62export type InstanceHttpApiType = typeof InstanceHttpApi
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
182export function createRoutes(183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,208      Provider.defaultLayer,209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )
packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {34  if (!config?.fetch) {35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {47    config.headers = {48      ...config.headers,49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })57}
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55 
43export interface Interface {44  readonly trigger: <45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(49    name: Name,50    input: Input,51    output: Output,52  ) => Effect.Effect<Output>53  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Hooks[]>54  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>55}
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()135        const input: PluginInput = {136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {269        const fn = hook[name] as any270        if (!fn) continue271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))272      }273      return output274    })

2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置

Section titled “2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置”

这一层位于 runtime 外围：

关键判断：

  • OpenCodeHttpApi 是 Root、Event、Instance、PtyConnect 的组合。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:54-59。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:54-59 
    54export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])

  • createRoutes 把 handlers 和大量 runtime service layer 组合起来。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
    182export function createRoutes(183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,208      Provider.defaultLayer,209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )

  • SDK createOpencodeClient 在 client interceptor 中改写 directory query。来源：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31、packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57。

    packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31 
    17function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {18  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request1920  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)21  if (!value) return request2223  const url = new URL(request.url)24  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {25    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)26  }2728  const next = new Request(url, request)29  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")30  return next31}
    packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
    33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {34  if (!config?.fetch) {35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {47    config.headers = {48      ...config.headers,49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })57}

  • Plugin input 里直接给插件一个 SDK client 和 project/worktree/directory/serverUrl。来源：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150。

    packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
    126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()135        const input: PluginInput = {136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }

3. 生活类比

Section titled “3. 生活类比”

如果 agent runtime 是公司内部各部门，那么 API/SDK 是对外服务大厅：

  • HTTP API 是窗口编号和办理事项。
  • SDK 是客户拿到的一本“办事小程序”，不用自己拼 URL。
  • SSE event 是排队叫号屏。
  • Plugin 是外包团队的入驻机制：给它工牌、内部系统客户端和规则，允许它在指定 hook 点参与工作。

4. Java 开发者类比

Section titled “4. Java 开发者类比”
  • HttpApiGroup 像 Spring Controller group。
  • HttpApiEndpoint 像 @PostMapping + request/response schema。
  • handlers 像 Controller method 调 Service。
  • Effect Layer 装配像 Spring Boot auto configuration / application context。
  • JS SDK 像 OpenAPI generated client + wrapper。
  • EventApi SSE 像 Spring WebFlux text/event-stream。
  • Plugin hook 像 SPI + application events + interceptor。

5. 最小源码路径

Section titled “5. 最小源码路径”
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67：in-process Server.Default().app.fetch。
packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67 
58export const Default = lazy(() => {59  const handler = HttpApiApp.webHandler().handler60  const app: ServerApp = {61    fetch: (request: Request) => handler(request, HttpApiApp.context),62    request(input, init) {63      return app.fetch(input instanceof Request ? input : new Request(new URL(input, "http://localhost"), init))64    },65  }66  return { app }67})
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:75-100：listen 对外启动 HTTP server。
packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:75-100 
75export async function listen(opts: ListenOptions): Promise<Listener> {76  const listener = await Effect.runPromise(listenEffect(opts))77  return {78    hostname: listener.hostname,79    port: listener.port,80    url: listener.url,81    stop: (close?: boolean) => Effect.runPromiseExit(listener.stop(close)).then(() => undefined),82  }83}8485const listenEffect: (opts: ListenOptions) => Effect.Effect<EffectListener, unknown> = Effect.fn("Server.listen")(86  function* (opts: ListenOptions) {87    const state = yield* startWithPortFallback(opts)88    const address = yield* tcpAddress(state)89    const listenerUrl = makeURL(opts.hostname, address.port)90    url = listenerUrl9192    const unpublishMdns = yield* setupMdns(opts, address.port, state.scope)9394    return {95      hostname: opts.hostname,96      port: address.port,97      url: listenerUrl,98      stop: yield* makeStop(state, unpublishMdns),99    }100  },
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62：API group 组合。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62 
30export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")31  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)32  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)33  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)34  .middleware(Authorization)3536export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")37  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)38  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)39  .addHttpApi(FileApi)40  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)41  .addHttpApi(McpApi)42  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)43  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)44  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)45  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)46  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)47  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)48  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)49  .addHttpApi(V2Api)50  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)51  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)52  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)5354export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])6061export type RootHttpApiType = typeof RootHttpApi62export type InstanceHttpApiType = typeof InstanceHttpApi
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:103-151：root/event/instance routes 分层。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:103-151 
103// Route tree:104// - rootApiRoutes: typed /global/* and control routes; auth is declared by RootHttpApi.105// - eventApiRoutes/rawInstanceRoutes: raw instance routes; auth and workspace routing happen as router middleware.106// - instanceApiRoutes: schema routes; auth is declared on each group and workspace context is provided below.107// - uiRoute: raw catch-all fallback; auth is router middleware so public static assets can bypass it.108const authOnlyRouterLayer = authorizationRouterMiddleware.layer.pipe(Layer.provide(ServerAuth.Config.defaultLayer))109const httpApiAuthLayer = authorizationLayer.pipe(Layer.provide(ServerAuth.Config.defaultLayer))110const rootApiRoutes = HttpApiBuilder.layer(RootHttpApi).pipe(111  Layer.provide([controlHandlers, globalHandlers]),112  Layer.provide(schemaErrorLayer),113  Layer.provide(httpApiAuthLayer),114)115const instanceRouterLayer = authorizationRouterMiddleware116  .combine(instanceRouterMiddleware)117  .combine(workspaceRouterMiddleware)118  .layer.pipe(Layer.provide(Socket.layerWebSocketConstructorGlobal), Layer.provide(ServerAuth.Config.defaultLayer))119const eventApiRoutes = HttpApiBuilder.layer(EventApi).pipe(120  Layer.provide(eventHandlers),121  Layer.provide(instanceRouterLayer),122)123const instanceApiRoutes = HttpApiBuilder.layer(InstanceHttpApi).pipe(124  Layer.provide([125    configHandlers,126    experimentalHandlers,127    fileHandlers,128    instanceHandlers,129    mcpHandlers,130    projectHandlers,131    ptyHandlers,132    questionHandlers,133    permissionHandlers,134    providerHandlers,135    sessionHandlers,136    syncHandlers,137    v2Handlers,138    tuiHandlers,139    workspaceHandlers,140  ]),141)142143const rawInstanceRoutes = Layer.mergeAll(ptyConnectRoute).pipe(Layer.provide(instanceRouterLayer))144const instanceRoutes = Layer.mergeAll(rawInstanceRoutes, instanceApiRoutes).pipe(145  Layer.provide([146    httpApiAuthLayer,147    workspaceRoutingLayer.pipe(Layer.provide(Socket.layerWebSocketConstructorGlobal)),148    instanceContextLayer,149    schemaErrorLayer,150  ]),151)
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240：createRoutes 装配 services。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
182export function createRoutes(183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,208      Provider.defaultLayer,209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )

identifier: "session.prompt",321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324   1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts:9-24：SSE event API 定义。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts:9-24 
9export const EventApi = HttpApi.make("event").add(10  HttpApiGroup.make("event")11    .add(12      HttpApiEndpoint.get("subscribe", EventPaths.event, {13        query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,14        success: Schema.String.pipe(HttpApiSchema.asText({ contentType: "text/event-stream" })),15      }).annotateMerge(16        OpenApi.annotations({17          identifier: "event.subscribe",18          summary: "Subscribe to events",19          description: "Get events",20        }),21      ),22    )23    .annotateMerge(OpenApi.annotations({ title: "event", description: "Instance event stream route." })),24)
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53：SSE event response。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {22  return Effect.gen(function* () {23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })
  1. packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57：JS SDK client wrapper。
packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {34  if (!config?.fetch) {35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {47    config.headers = {48      ...config.headers,49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })57}
  1. packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-134：启动 server/TUI 的 SDK helper。
packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-134 
22export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {23  options = Object.assign(24    {25      hostname: "127.0.0.1",26      port: 4096,27      timeout: 5000,28    },29    options ?? {},30  )3132  const args = [`serve`, `--hostname=${options.hostname}`, `--port=${options.port}`]33  if (options.config?.logLevel) args.push(`--log-level=${options.config.logLevel}`)3435  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {36    env: {37      ...process.env,38      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options.config ?? {}),39    },40  })41  let clear = () => {}4243  const url = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {44    const id = setTimeout(() => {45      clear()46      stop(proc)47      reject(new Error(`Timeout waiting for server to start after ${options.timeout}ms`))48    }, options.timeout)49    let output = ""50    let resolved = false51    proc.stdout?.on("data", (chunk) => {52      if (resolved) return53      output += chunk.toString()54      const lines = output.split("\n")55      for (const line of lines) {56        if (line.startsWith("opencode server listening")) {57          const match = line.match(/on\s+(https?:\/\/[^\s]+)/)58          if (!match) {59            clear()60            stop(proc)61            clearTimeout(id)62            reject(new Error(`Failed to parse server url from output: ${line}`))63            return64          }65          clearTimeout(id)66          resolved = true67          resolve(match[1]!)68          return69        }70      }71    })72    proc.stderr?.on("data", (chunk) => {73      output += chunk.toString()74    })75    proc.on("exit", (code) => {76      clearTimeout(id)77      let msg = `Server exited with code ${code}`78      if (output.trim()) {79        msg += `\nServer output: ${output}`80      }81      reject(new Error(msg))82    })83    proc.on("error", (error) => {84      clearTimeout(id)85      reject(error)86    })87    clear = bindAbort(proc, options.signal, () => {88      clearTimeout(id)89      reject(options.signal?.reason)90    })91  })9293  return {94    url,95    close() {96      clear()97      stop(proc)98    },99  }100}101102export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {103  const args = []104105  if (options?.project) {106    args.push(`--project=${options.project}`)107  }108  if (options?.model) {109    args.push(`--model=${options.model}`)110  }111  if (options?.session) {112    args.push(`--session=${options.session}`)113  }114  if (options?.agent) {115    args.push(`--agent=${options.agent}`)116  }117118  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {119    stdio: "inherit",120    env: {121      ...process.env,122      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options?.config ?? {}),123    },124  })125126  const clear = bindAbort(proc, options?.signal)127128  return {129    close() {130      clear()131      stop(proc)132    },133  }134}
  1. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55：Plugin service interface。
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55 
43export interface Interface {44  readonly trigger: <45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(49    name: Name,50    input: Input,51    output: Output,52  ) => Effect.Effect<Output>53  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Hooks[]>54  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>55}
  1. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150：PluginInput。
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()135        const input: PluginInput = {136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }
  1. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274：Plugin.trigger。
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {269        const fn = hook[name] as any270        if (!fn) continue271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))272      }273      return output274    })
  1. packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-80：插件包对外类型。
packages/plugin/src/index.ts packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-80 
56export type PluginInput = {57  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>58  project: Project59  directory: string60  worktree: string61  experimental_workspace: {62    register(type: string, adapter: WorkspaceAdapter): void63  }64  serverUrl: URL65  $: BunShell66}6768export type PluginOptions = Record<string, unknown>6970export type Config = Omit<SDKConfig, "plugin"> & {71  plugin?: Array<string | [string, PluginOptions]>72}7374export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput, options?: PluginOptions) => Promise<Hooks>7576export type PluginModule = {77  id?: string78  server: Plugin79  tui?: never80}

6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路

Section titled “6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路”

6.1 API group 组合

Section titled “6.1 API group 组合”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-59

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-59 
30export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")31  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)32  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)33  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)34  .middleware(Authorization)3536export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")37  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)38  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)39  .addHttpApi(FileApi)40  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)41  .addHttpApi(McpApi)42  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)43  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)44  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)45  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)46  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)47  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)48  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)49  .addHttpApi(V2Api)50  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)51  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)52  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)5354export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])

这说明 HTTP API 是模块化 group，不是一个巨大 controller 文件。

6.2 API route 到 runtime services

Section titled “6.2 API route 到 runtime services”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
182export function createRoutes(183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,208      Provider.defaultLayer,209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )

Java 类比：这是把 Controller、Service、Repository、EventBus、ToolRegistry、Provider 等全部放进 Spring ApplicationContext。

6.3 in-process server

Section titled “6.3 in-process server”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67

packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67 
58export const Default = lazy(() => {59  const handler = HttpApiApp.webHandler().handler60  const app: ServerApp = {61    fetch: (request: Request) => handler(request, HttpApiApp.context),62    request(input, init) {63      return app.fetch(input instanceof Request ? input : new Request(new URL(input, "http://localhost"), init))64    },65  }66  return { app }67})

这就是为什么 CLI/TUI local 模式可以用 Server.Default().app.fetch，不必真的监听端口。

6.4 Session API endpoint

Section titled “6.4 Session API endpoint”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324 
312        HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {313          params: { sessionID: SessionID },314          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,315          payload: PromptPayload,316          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),317          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],318        }).annotateMerge(319          OpenApi.annotations({320            identifier: "session.prompt",321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324        ),

command 和 shell 也是同一组 session API：

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:339-363

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:339-363 
339        HttpApiEndpoint.post("command", SessionPaths.command, {340          params: { sessionID: SessionID },341          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,342          payload: CommandPayload,343          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),344          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],345        }).annotateMerge(346          OpenApi.annotations({347            identifier: "session.command",348            summary: "Send command",349            description: "Send a new command to a session for execution by the AI assistant.",350          }),351        ),352        HttpApiEndpoint.post("shell", SessionPaths.shell, {353          params: { sessionID: SessionID },354          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,355          payload: ShellPayload,356          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),357          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],358        }).annotateMerge(359          OpenApi.annotations({360            identifier: "session.shell",361            summary: "Run shell command",362            description: "Execute a shell command within the session context and return the AI's response.",363          }),

6.5 Event API / SSE

Section titled “6.5 Event API / SSE”

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts:9-24

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts:9-24 
9export const EventApi = HttpApi.make("event").add(10  HttpApiGroup.make("event")11    .add(12      HttpApiEndpoint.get("subscribe", EventPaths.event, {13        query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,14        success: Schema.String.pipe(HttpApiSchema.asText({ contentType: "text/event-stream" })),15      }).annotateMerge(16        OpenApi.annotations({17          identifier: "event.subscribe",18          summary: "Subscribe to events",19          description: "Get events",20        }),21      ),22    )23    .annotateMerge(OpenApi.annotations({ title: "event", description: "Instance event stream route." })),24)

handler 把 Bus events 和 heartbeat 编成 SSE：

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {22  return Effect.gen(function* () {23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

6.6 JS SDK client wrapper

Section titled “6.6 JS SDK client wrapper”

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57

packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {34  if (!config?.fetch) {35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {47    config.headers = {48      ...config.headers,49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })57}

rewrite 会把 GET/HEAD 的 x-opencode-directory 变成 query：

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31

packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31 
17function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {18  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request1920  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)21  if (!value) return request2223  const url = new URL(request.url)24  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {25    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)26  }2728  const next = new Request(url, request)29  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")30  return next31}

6.7 SDK helper 启动 server/TUI

Section titled “6.7 SDK helper 启动 server/TUI”

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-40

packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-40 
22export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {23  options = Object.assign(24    {25      hostname: "127.0.0.1",26      port: 4096,27      timeout: 5000,28    },29    options ?? {},30  )3132  const args = [`serve`, `--hostname=${options.hostname}`, `--port=${options.port}`]33  if (options.config?.logLevel) args.push(`--log-level=${options.config.logLevel}`)3435  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {36    env: {37      ...process.env,38      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options.config ?? {}),39    },40  })

启动 TUI：

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:102-134

packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:102-134 
102export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {103  const args = []104105  if (options?.project) {106    args.push(`--project=${options.project}`)107  }108  if (options?.model) {109    args.push(`--model=${options.model}`)110  }111  if (options?.session) {112    args.push(`--session=${options.session}`)113  }114  if (options?.agent) {115    args.push(`--agent=${options.agent}`)116  }117118  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {119    stdio: "inherit",120    env: {121      ...process.env,122      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options?.config ?? {}),123    },124  })125126  const clear = bindAbort(proc, options?.signal)127128  return {129    close() {130      clear()131      stop(proc)132    },133  }134}

6.8 Plugin service interface 和 trigger

Section titled “6.8 Plugin service interface 和 trigger”

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55 
43export interface Interface {44  readonly trigger: <45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(49    name: Name,50    input: Input,51    output: Output,52  ) => Effect.Effect<Output>53  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Hooks[]>54  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>55}

插件加载时，OpenCode 给插件的输入：

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()135        const input: PluginInput = {136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }

trigger 执行 hooks：

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {269        const fn = hook[name] as any270        if (!fn) continue271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))272      }273      return output274    })

这就是 LLM 章看到的 chat.params、Shell 章看到的 shell.env、Tool 章看到的 tool.execute.before/after 的底层机制。

6.9 对外插件类型

Section titled “6.9 对外插件类型”

路径：packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-80

packages/plugin/src/index.ts packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-80 
56export type PluginInput = {57  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>58  project: Project59  directory: string60  worktree: string61  experimental_workspace: {62    register(type: string, adapter: WorkspaceAdapter): void63  }64  serverUrl: URL65  $: BunShell66}6768export type PluginOptions = Record<string, unknown>6970export type Config = Omit<SDKConfig, "plugin"> & {71  plugin?: Array<string | [string, PluginOptions]>72}7374export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput, options?: PluginOptions) => Promise<Hooks>7576export type PluginModule = {77  id?: string78  server: Plugin79  tui?: never80}

插件包不是随便导出函数，而是有类型约束的 server plugin module。

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 API 组合不是目录树，而是 typed contract

Section titled “7.1 API 组合不是目录树，而是 typed contract”

api.ts 通过 HttpApi.make().addHttpApi() 组合 typed endpoint group。每个 group 定义 endpoint payload、success、error 和 OpenAPI annotations。Java 开发者可以理解为 Controller 接口 + OpenAPI schema。

7.2 server routes 是 runtime 装配点

Section titled “7.2 server routes 是 runtime 装配点”

server.ts 的 createRoutes 是非常重要的架构中心：它同时合并 route layer 和 runtime service layer。agent 项目的 HTTP 层不是薄薄的 controller，它需要把 SessionPrompt、ToolRegistry、Provider、Permission、LSP、MCP、Plugin 全部装配进请求上下文。

7.3 SDK 是所有 UI 的公共语言

Section titled “7.3 SDK 是所有 UI 的公共语言”

CLI/TUI/Web/Desktop/Plugin 都倾向于使用 SDK，而不是手写 fetch。这样 session.prompt、permission.reply、event.subscribe、global.event 等调用方式一致。源码证据：

  • CLI run imports createOpencodeClient。来源：packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:23。

    packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:23 
    23import { createOpencodeClient, type OpencodeClient, type ToolPart } from "@opencode-ai/sdk/v2"

  • TUI SDK context 调用 createOpencodeClient。来源：packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sdk.tsx:1-31。

    packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sdk.tsx packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sdk.tsx:1-31 
    1import { createOpencodeClient } from "@opencode-ai/sdk/v2"2import type { GlobalEvent } from "@opencode-ai/sdk/v2"3import { createSimpleContext } from "./helper"4import { createGlobalEmitter } from "@solid-primitives/event-bus"5import { Flag } from "@opencode-ai/core/flag/flag"6import { batch, onCleanup, onMount } from "solid-js"78export type EventSource = {9  subscribe: (handler: (event: GlobalEvent) => void) => Promise<() => void>10}1112export const { use: useSDK, provider: SDKProvider } = createSimpleContext({13  name: "SDK",14  init: (props: {15    url: string16    directory?: string17    fetch?: typeof fetch18    headers?: RequestInit["headers"]19    events?: EventSource20  }) => {21    const abort = new AbortController()22    let sse: AbortController | undefined2324    function createSDK() {25      return createOpencodeClient({26        baseUrl: props.url,27        signal: abort.signal,28        directory: props.directory,29        fetch: props.fetch,30        headers: props.headers,31      })

  • Plugin service 给插件注入 SDK client。来源：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150。

    packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
    126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()135        const input: PluginInput = {136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }

7.4 Event API 是 UI 实时性的基础

Section titled “7.4 Event API 是 UI 实时性的基础”

SSE handler 先发 server.connected，再合并 bus events 和 heartbeat。这个设计避免 UI 只能靠轮询拿状态。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53。

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {22  return Effect.gen(function* () {23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

7.5 Plugin 是受控扩展，不是随意 monkey patch

Section titled “7.5 Plugin 是受控扩展，不是随意 monkey patch”

Plugin 系统加载 hooks，然后在运行时显式调用 Plugin.trigger(name, input, output)。插件只能在 OpenCode 暴露的 hook 点影响流程，不是随意改内部对象。来源：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274。

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {269        const fn = hook[name] as any270        if (!fn) continue271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))272      }273      return output274    })

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”

generic + keyof + conditional mapped type

Section titled “generic + keyof + conditional mapped type”

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:38-41

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:38-41 
38// Hook names that follow the (input, output) => Promise<void> trigger pattern39type TriggerName = {40  [K in keyof Hooks]-?: NonNullable<Hooks[K]> extends (input: any, output: any) => Promise<void> ? K : never41}[keyof Hooks]

这段从 Hooks 中筛选出符合 (input, output) => Promise<void> 形状的 hook 名。Java 没有直接等价物，这是 TS 类型编程。

Parameters

Section titled “Parameters”

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:45-48

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:45-48 
45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(

从 hook 函数类型中抽取第 0、第 1 个参数类型。Java 泛型做不到这么直接。

namespace

Section titled “namespace”

路径：packages/app/src/context/server.tsx:63-120

packages/app/src/context/server.tsx packages/app/src/context/server.tsx:63-120 
63export namespace ServerConnection {64  type Base = { displayName?: string }6566  export type HttpBase = {67    url: string68    username?: string69    password?: string70  }7172  // Regular web connections73  export type Http = {74    type: "http"75    http: HttpBase76    authToken?: boolean77  } & Base7879  export type Sidecar = {80    type: "sidecar"81    http: HttpBase82  } & (83    | // Regular desktop server84    { variant: "base" }85    // WSL server (windows only)86    | {87        variant: "wsl"88        distro: string89      }90  ) &91    Base9293  // Remote server desktop can SSH into94  export type Ssh = {95    type: "ssh"96    host: string97    // SSH client exposes an HTTP server for the app to use as a proxy98    http: HttpBase99  } & Base100101  export type Any =102    | Http103    // All these are desktop-only104    | (Sidecar | Ssh)105106  export const key = (conn: Any): Key => {107    switch (conn.type) {108      case "http":109        return Key.make(conn.http.url)110      case "sidecar": {111        if (conn.variant === "wsl") return Key.make(`wsl:${conn.distro}`)112        return Key.make("sidecar")113      }114      case "ssh":115        return Key.make(`ssh:${conn.host}`)116    }117  }118119  export type Key = string & { _brand: "Key" }120  export const Key = { make: (v: string) => v as Key }

TS namespace 可以把类型和函数放在同一命名空间下。现代项目更常用 module export，但这里用于组织相关类型/函数。

function overload

Section titled “function overload”

lsp/launch.ts 中有 overload，本章 SDK 虽未深入，但你在 server/desktop 里会看到类似 API shape。TS overload 用多个签名描述同一函数的不同调用形式，Java 用方法重载。

ReturnType

Section titled “ReturnType”

路径：packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-58

packages/plugin/src/index.ts packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-58 
56export type PluginInput = {57  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>58  project: Project

从函数返回值推导类型，避免重复定义 SDK client 类型。

async iterator / stream

Section titled “async iterator / stream”

SSE 在 SDK 里通常被消费成 async iterable，UI 用 for await。Java 类比 Reactive Streams。

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”
  • Typed API contract：endpoint 有 payload/success/error schema。
  • Layered service assembly：HTTP routes 和 runtime services 通过 Effect Layer 装配。
  • Generated SDK + wrapper：生成客户端再加目录、错误处理、fetch 适配。
  • SSE event bus bridge：Bus events 通过 SSE 变成外部可消费 stream。
  • Plugin SPI：插件通过 typed hooks 接入。
  • In-process adapter：Server.Default().app.fetch 让插件/CLI 不必起外部 HTTP。
  • Separation of extension points：tools、provider params、shell env、events 各自有 hook。

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”

  • 和 Tool：ToolRegistry 会读取 plugin tools；插件 hook 可在 tool definition/execution 前后介入。来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:219-224、packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:90-116。

    packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:219-224 
    219            custom.push(fromPlugin(id, def))220          }221        }222223        yield* config.get()224        const questionEnabled = ["app", "cli", "desktop"].includes(flags.client) || flags.enableQuestionTool
    packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:90-116 
    90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }

  • 和 Provider：LLM 层调用 chat.params、chat.headers、system transform 等 plugin hooks。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:126-202。

    packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:126-202 
    126      const header = system[0]127      yield* plugin.trigger(128        "experimental.chat.system.transform",129        { sessionID: input.sessionID, model: input.model },130        { system },131      )132      // rejoin to maintain 2-part structure for caching if header unchanged133      if (system.length > 2 && system[0] === header) {134        const rest = system.slice(1)135        system.length = 0136        system.push(header, rest.join("\n"))137      }138139      const variant =140        !input.small && input.model.variants && input.user.model.variant141          ? input.model.variants[input.user.model.variant]142          : {}143      const base = input.small144        ? ProviderTransform.smallOptions(input.model)145        : ProviderTransform.options({146            model: input.model,147            sessionID: input.sessionID,148            providerOptions: item.options,149          })150      const options = mergeOptions(mergeOptions(mergeOptions(base, input.model.options), input.agent.options), variant)151      if (isOpenaiOauth) {152        options.instructions = system.join("\n")153      }154155      const isWorkflow = language instanceof GitLabWorkflowLanguageModel156      const messages = isOpenaiOauth157        ? input.messages158        : isWorkflow159          ? input.messages160          : [161              ...system.map(162                (x): ModelMessage => ({163                  role: "system",164                  content: x,165                }),166              ),167              ...input.messages,168            ]169170      const params = yield* plugin.trigger(171        "chat.params",172        {173          sessionID: input.sessionID,174          agent: input.agent.name,175          model: input.model,176          provider: item,177          message: input.user,178        },179        {180          temperature: input.model.capabilities.temperature181            ? (input.agent.temperature ?? ProviderTransform.temperature(input.model))182            : undefined,183          topP: input.agent.topP ?? ProviderTransform.topP(input.model),184          topK: ProviderTransform.topK(input.model),185          maxOutputTokens: ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model, flags.outputTokenMax),186          options,187        },188      )189190      const { headers } = yield* plugin.trigger(191        "chat.headers",192        {193          sessionID: input.sessionID,194          agent: input.agent.name,195          model: input.model,196          provider: item,197          message: input.user,198        },199        {200          headers: {},201        },202      )

  • 和 Session：Session API 暴露 prompt/command/shell/revert/permissionRespond 等 endpoint。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-405。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-405 
    312        HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {313          params: { sessionID: SessionID },314          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,315          payload: PromptPayload,316          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),317          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],318        }).annotateMerge(319          OpenApi.annotations({320            identifier: "session.prompt",321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324        ),325        HttpApiEndpoint.post("promptAsync", SessionPaths.promptAsync, {326          params: { sessionID: SessionID },327          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,328          payload: PromptPayload,329          success: described(HttpApiSchema.NoContent, "Prompt accepted"),330          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],331        }).annotateMerge(332          OpenApi.annotations({333            identifier: "session.prompt_async",334            summary: "Send async message",335            description:336              "Create and send a new message to a session asynchronously, starting the session if needed and returning immediately.",337          }),338        ),339        HttpApiEndpoint.post("command", SessionPaths.command, {340          params: { sessionID: SessionID },341          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,342          payload: CommandPayload,343          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),344          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],345        }).annotateMerge(346          OpenApi.annotations({347            identifier: "session.command",348            summary: "Send command",349            description: "Send a new command to a session for execution by the AI assistant.",350          }),351        ),352        HttpApiEndpoint.post("shell", SessionPaths.shell, {353          params: { sessionID: SessionID },354          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,355          payload: ShellPayload,356          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),357          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],358        }).annotateMerge(359          OpenApi.annotations({360            identifier: "session.shell",361            summary: "Run shell command",362            description: "Execute a shell command within the session context and return the AI's response.",363          }),364        ),365        HttpApiEndpoint.post("revert", SessionPaths.revert, {366          params: { sessionID: SessionID },367          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,368          payload: RevertPayload,369          success: described(Session.Info, "Updated session"),370          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],371        }).annotateMerge(372          OpenApi.annotations({373            identifier: "session.revert",374            summary: "Revert message",375            description:376              "Revert a specific message in a session, undoing its effects and restoring the previous state.",377          }),378        ),379        HttpApiEndpoint.post("unrevert", SessionPaths.unrevert, {380          params: { sessionID: SessionID },381          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,382          success: described(Session.Info, "Updated session"),383          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],384        }).annotateMerge(385          OpenApi.annotations({386            identifier: "session.unrevert",387            summary: "Restore reverted messages",388            description: "Restore all previously reverted messages in a session.",389          }),390        ),391        HttpApiEndpoint.post("permissionRespond", SessionPaths.permissions, {392          params: { sessionID: SessionID, permissionID: PermissionID },393          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,394          payload: PermissionResponsePayload,395          success: described(Schema.Boolean, "Permission processed successfully"),396          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],397        }).annotateMerge(398          OpenApi.annotations({399            identifier: "permission.respond",400            summary: "Respond to permission",401            description: "Approve or deny a permission request from the AI assistant.",402            deprecated: true,403          }),404        ),405        HttpApiEndpoint.delete("deleteMessage", SessionPaths.deleteMessage, {

  • 和文件系统：FileApi、WorkspaceRoutingQuery、directory header/query 让同一 server 能按工作区路由请求。来源：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31。

    packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31 
    17function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {18  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request1920  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)21  if (!value) return request2223  const url = new URL(request.url)24  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {25    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)26  }2728  const next = new Request(url, request)29  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")30  return next31}

  • 和 UI：Event API/SSE 是 UI 同步状态的基础。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
    21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {22  return Effect.gen(function* () {23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

mini agent 至少要有这三层：

实现顺序：

  1. POST /session/:id/prompt。
  2. GET /event SSE。
  3. JS SDK wrapper。
  4. permission reply endpoint。
  5. plugin hook registry。
  6. plugin tool extension。

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

请你不看源码复述：

  1. RootHttpApi、InstanceHttpApi、EventApi 的差异是什么？
  2. 为什么 SDK client 要处理 directory header/query？
  3. Event API 为什么要加 heartbeat？
  4. PluginInput 为什么要给插件 SDK client 和 serverUrl？
  5. Plugin.trigger 和随意 monkey patch 的差异是什么？

如果说不出来，常见卡点是：

  • 只看到 HTTP endpoint，没有看到 Effect Layer 装配 runtime。
  • 把 SDK 当成简单 fetch wrapper，没有看到 directory routing 和 error interceptor。
  • 把 plugin 理解成“加载脚本”，没有看到 typed hooks 和 trigger 点。

换一种说法：API/SDK 是 agent 的“外部神经接口”，插件是可控的“神经接线板”。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 找到 OpenCodeHttpApi，列出它包含哪些 API group。
  2. 找到 SessionApi.prompt endpoint，写出 params、payload、success。
  3. 找到 createOpencodeClient，解释 directory 是如何传给后端的。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 阅读 createRoutes，把 service layer 分成 session/tool/provider/UI/infra 几组。
  2. 阅读 Event handler，解释为什么先发 server.connected。
  3. 阅读 Plugin service，解释内部插件和外部插件加载路径的差异。

源码追踪题

Section titled “源码追踪题”
  1. 从 client.session.prompt 追到 Session API endpoint，再追到 handler。
  2. 从 sdk.global.event 追到 /event SSE handler。
  3. 从 Plugin.trigger("chat.params") 追到 plugin hook 类型。
  4. 从 plugin tool 定义追到 ToolRegistry 加载。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

写一个 mini SDK/API：

  • POST /prompt
  • POST /permission/:id
  • GET /event
  • createMiniClient
  • registerPlugin(hooks)
  • triggerHook(name, input, output)

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”

建议阅读顺序：

  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts
  2. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts
  3. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts
  4. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts
  5. packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
  6. packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
  7. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts
  8. packages/plugin/src/index.ts
  9. packages/plugin/src/tool.ts

15. 面试式自测

Section titled “15. 面试式自测”
  1. API group 和 handler 为什么分开？
  2. 为什么 local CLI/TUI 可以不用监听端口也走 HTTP handler？
  3. 如果要给外部程序提供“创建 session 并 prompt”的能力，应该从 SDK 哪里开始？
  4. 如果要让插件修改 LLM temperature，应该接哪个 hook？
  5. 如果插件执行失败，为什么不应该让整个 server 崩掉？
  6. 如果要给 mini agent 做插件系统，你会先支持 tool plugin，还是 chat.params hook？为什么？

16. 下一步阅读建议

Section titled “16. 下一步阅读建议”

下一章读 “测试与工程化”。API/SDK/Plugin 已经说明系统边界，工程化章会看这个多 package 项目如何构建、检查和测试。
